item.title: CVE-2026-51947 - CVE-2026-51947 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2026-51947-Advisory: Pivotal CRM's patch for an initial deserialization vulnerability was incomplete. The fix switched from BinaryFormatter to JSON.NET but left TypeNameHandling set to 4 without implementing SerializationBinder, allowing attackers to execute arbitrary code through malicious $type payloads. Fixed in 6.6.5.10 and Patch_CWE502_20260316.zip
